phaseRows.reviewerAction: Open Packet 006 input copy and fill only real reviewer-owned fields.
phaseRows.hardStop: Stop if the file is not node-public-source-fit-batch-006-packet, has fewer than 42 rows, or any row already claims learnerCitationApproved/copy approval.

phaseRows.reviewerAction: Rerun Packet 006 validation after filling; all rows must be ready before merge preview can proceed.
phaseRows.hardStop: Stop while readyRows is 0, blockedRows is nonzero, missingFieldRows is nonzero, or realHumanInputEntries is 0.

phaseRows.reviewerAction: Confirm every Packet 006 row maps back to the full source-fit draft before any merge apply.
phaseRows.hardStop: Stop unless mappedRows equals packet rows, missingTargetRows is 0, and mergeAllowedNow is true after real review.

phaseRows.reviewerAction: Use dry-run apply to verify willWrite stays false until the packet is fully ready and explicit write authorization exists.
phaseRows.hardStop: Stop if writtenRows is nonzero in dry-run or any row willWrite before manual approval.

phaseRows.reviewerAction: After an authorized merge, rerun the progress matrix and confirm Packet 006 moves from blocked to ready.
phaseRows.hardStop: Stop if progress changes without real human input or if learner citations/copy approval appear.

phaseRows.command: npm.cmd run build:local-course-review-gate-dashboard && npm.cmd run check:local-course-review-gate-dashboard
phaseRows.reviewerAction: Refresh the single-screen review gate so packet progress, source-fit rows, and write authorization remain visible.
phaseRows.hardStop: Stop if writeAllowedNow becomes true before all real review gates and separate approval pass.

hardStops: Do not fill reviewer fields unless a real reviewer has inspected the node and source.
Do not set realHumanInput:true for generated, copied, fixture, or unreviewed rows.
Do not approve learner-facing citations or copied text in this packet handoff.
Do not run --write unless packet validation is fully ready, merge preview is ready, dry-run has been reviewed, and explicit human authorization names the exact input path.
Do not introduce stock recommendations, live signals, return promises, broker workflows, automation, or real-money guidance.
completionRule: This handoff is executable only as reviewer operations. It does not fill packet rows, does not create human judgments, does not approve learner-facing citations, and does not authorize --write. Packet 006 remains blocked until all 42 rows contain real human source-fit review input and pass validation.
boundary: Node public source-fit Packet 006 handoff is reviewer-facing education-only operations material. It organizes the packet input copy, validation, merge preview, dry-run apply, and progress checks; it does not write lessons, approve copied text, approve learner-facing citations, provide stock recommendations, live signals, return promises, broker workflows, automation, real-money guidance, or production readiness.
